pages.title: Smart Home Energy Management Revolutionized | Emporia Energy
pages.description: Smart home energy management made easy. Save on electricity costs with the Emporia Platform and our award-winning products.
pages.content:
[Skip to content](https://www.emporiaenergy.com/#content)

# Smart Home Energy Management Made Easy

Automate electricity bill savings with Emporia’s award-winning products.

[Shop](https://shop.emporiaenergy.com/)

[![](<Base64-Image-Removed>)\\
\\
**Classic EV Charger**](https://www.emporiaenergy.com/ev-chargers/) [![](<Base64-Image-Removed>)\\
\\
**Pro EV Charger**](https://www.emporiaenergy.com/pro-ev-charger/) [![](<Base64-Image-Removed>)\\
\\
**Vue Energy Monitor**](https://www.emporiaenergy.com/energy-monitors/) [![](<Base64-Image-Removed>)\\
\\
**Smart Plug**](https://www.emporiaenergy.com/emporia-smart-plug/) [![](<Base64-Image-Removed>)\\
\\
**Home Battery**](https://www.emporiaenergy.com/home-battery/)

## Take Control Of Your Energy Costs

The [Emporia Home Energy Management Platform](https://www.emporiaenergy.com/home-energy-management/) is a smart, automated solution that helps you save on energy costs. It works seamlessly in the background to monitor energy usage in real-time, down to individual circuits and appliances, and automatically adjusts connected devices to optimize electricity use and maximize savings.

[Shop All Products](https://shop.emporiaenergy.com/)

![](<Base64-Image-Removed>)

Simplify control of your home’s energy while saving electricity, money and the planet.

## Award-Winning Products

### Home Battery Backup

Keep your home powered and your bills low. Our battery stores energy so you’re ready for outages and smart enough to skip peak rates. Reliable. Efficient. Always on your side.

[Learn More](https://www.emporiaenergy.com/home-battery/)

![](<Base64-Image-Removed>)

### Classic EV Charger

Named the “Best Smart EV Home Charger” by MotorTrend, the “Best Overall Home EV Charger of 2024” by Good Housekeeping, and a “Best Home Charger” by NYTimes Wirecutter, the Classic is the proven choice for reliable and intelligent charging.

[Learn More](https://www.emporiaenergy.com/ev-chargers/)

![](<Base64-Image-Removed>)

### Pro EV Charger

The Emporia Pro EV Charger makes powerful automated Level 2 charging possible for almost any home. Thanks to PowerSmart technology, you can charge your EV up to 9 times faster than a level 1 charger using your existing electrical panel and save thousands on electrical upgrades.

[Learn More](https://www.emporiaenergy.com/pro-ev-charger/)

![](<Base64-Image-Removed>)

### Vue Energy Monitor

The Emporia Vue Home Energy Monitor is your gateway to smarter energy management, and the best way to identify expensive energy hogs quickly. Pair with our Smart Plugs, EV Chargers, and other connected devices to unlock full home automation and maximize your monthly savings.

[Learn More](https://www.emporiaenergy.com/energy-monitors/)

![](<Base64-Image-Removed>)

### Smart Plugs

With Emporia Smart Plugs, you can turn any appliance into a smart appliance. Just plug in to monitor energy use and control your appliance from anywhere with the Emporia app.

[Learn More](https://www.emporiaenergy.com/emporia-smart-plugs/)

![](<Base64-Image-Removed>)

### Home Battery Backup

Keep your home powered and your bills low. Our battery stores energy so you’re ready for outages and smart enough to skip peak rates. Reliable. Efficient. Always on your side.

[Learn More](https://www.emporiaenergy.com/home-battery/)

![](<Base64-Image-Removed>)

### Classic EV Charger

Named the “Best Smart EV Home Charger” by MotorTrend, the “Best Overall Home EV Charger of 2024” by Good Housekeeping, and a “Best Home Charger” by NYTimes Wirecutter, the Classic is the proven choice for reliable and intelligent charging.

[Learn More](https://www.emporiaenergy.com/ev-chargers/)

![](<Base64-Image-Removed>)

## Real Stories. Real Savings.

“Within days of installing the system I know that I need to replace my upstairs AC and my garage refrigerator. Those two items account for 40% of my energy usage. Spending $200 for this device saved me from replacing the wrong thing. Absolutely worth every penny.”

– Gerald G.

“Very happy with Emporia. I was able to cut my usage in June by 2/3 compared to the last two years.”

– John

“This is a terrific EV charger. It charges quickly and efficiently. My installers were able to get it installed easily. The app is also very easy to use. Also, the customer service folks are responsive and helpful. Really glad we chose Emporia to work with.”

– Lynn

“I did quite a bit of research before choosing the Emporia EV Charger. I considered features, warranty and price and found it to be great quality, fit and finish. The 24-foot charging cable is heavy duty, yet easy to maneuver and hang up. I have had it for 6 weeks now and everything is great!”

– Chuck

“This Smart EV Charger (EVSE – Electric Vehicle Supply Equipment) is one of the best values for the money. It integrates with their Emporia Vue Energy Monitor and Vue Utility Connect devices. Highly recommended!”

– Matt M.
